title: TrustForge Plugin Manifest
description: Declarative manifest describing a TrustForge plugin. See TF-0008.

plugin_version.description: Version of the plugin-manifest schema itself.

actor_id.description: Actor URI the plugin operates as once loaded. Use tf:actor:plugin:...

entry.description: Path (relative to the manifest) to the plugin entry point — a .js/.ts/.mjs module for native, or a .wasm file for WASM.

identity_pub.description: Base64-encoded ed25519 public key that signs this manifest.

signature.description: Signature envelope over the canonical form of this manifest with signature.signature cleared.

capabilities.description: Capabilities the plugin declares it needs. Enforced by the registry + guard.

imports.description: WASM-only: host functions the plugin is allowed to import. The registry enforces that only these imports are supplied.

proof_profile.description: Optional proof level at which this plugin's actions should be emitted.

conformance_profile.description: Conformance profile labels this plugin claims (e.g. tf-plugin-compatible, tf-bridge-compatible). The registry surfaces this so daemons can refuse plugins that don't claim a profile they require.
